title: STATUS Ceiling Switch | White 6A 2 Way Pull Cord Light Switch Bathroom | SCS6A2WPB3
description: Status ceiling switch is supplied with mounting block. 2-way switch. 6 A inductive load. Suitable for industrial and commercial uses. Easy to fit. Recyclable product. CE certified. Comes with poly bag packaging in counter display unit (CDU).
